episodes.title: 10 Infamous Cults That Don't Exist Anymore
episodes.description:
Dive into the dark history of some of the most infamous cults that have faded away but left a lasting impact. From doomsday prophecies and mass suicides to shocking crimes and secret rituals, these groups shocked the world and sparked intense media and legal attention. This video covers cults like Love Has Won, formed by a self-proclaimed deity; NXIVM, exposed for branding and blackmail; The Manson Family’s murderous spree; Heaven’s Gate’s tragic mass suicide; as well as The Order of the Solar Temple, Branch Davidians, and more. Join us for a chilling look at these notorious groups and their lasting legacies.

episodes.title: Netflix's Kidnapped: Elizabeth Smart | 10 Shocking Reveals (& What Was Left Out)
episodes.description:
The truth behind the headlines is more disturbing than you know... Join us as we examine the shocking revelations from Netflix's "Kidnapped" documentary about Elizabeth Smart's abduction. From dismissed evidence to near-rescues, we uncover the untold aspects of this notorious case that continue to haunt us today. Our breakdown includes Richard Ricci's tragic death in custody, Brian David Mitchell's plan for multiple victims, Mary Katherine's ignored testimony, police failures that prolonged Elizabeth's captivity, and the disturbing societal biases that framed this case. Which revelation from the Smart case disturbs you the most? Let us know in the comments below!

episodes.title: Allison Mack's NXIVM Cult Podcast: 10 Shocking Reveals
episodes.description:
Dive into the dark and unsettling world of NXIVM as Alison Mack opens up on her controversial podcast. We explore the most shocking and revealing moments where she discusses cult secrets, personal struggles, and the intricate manipulation behind the scenes. From uncovering hidden rituals to exposing the psychological tactics employed by leaders, this video uncovers the startling truths that have come to light. Whether you followed the story closely or are discovering it now, get ready for an intense, eye-opening journey into the NXIVM scandal and its lasting impact.

episodes.title: 20 Popular Celebrities Linked to Cults
episodes.description:
Even Hollywood's brightest stars aren't immune to the allure or dangers of controversial groups. Join us as we delve into the surprising connections between popular figures and organizations widely described as cults. From those born into them to others who joined later in life, these stories shed light on how fame and vulnerability can intersect with intense spiritual or social movements, revealing a darker side to the glittering world of celebrity. Our list explores famous names linked to groups like Children of God, Christian Science, NXIVM, and Scientology. Discover the tales of Joaquin Phoenix, Glenn Close, Allison Mack, Rose McGowan, Michele Pfeiffer, R. Kelly, Dennis Wilson, and the Arquette Family, whose lives were touched by these often-controversial organizations.
